analysis.primary_subject: A kitchen undergoing renovation with visible carpentry work on cabinets and countertops

craftsmanship_quality.precision: Medium - [The cabinetry alignment appears straight, but some gaps and unevenness are visible]
craftsmanship_quality.surface_quality: Medium - [The surfaces are mostly smooth, but there are areas with visible imperfections and dust]
craftsmanship_quality.attention_to_detail: Medium - [The installation is functional, but some finishing touches are still needed]

portfolio_presentation.accompanying_text: This image showcases a kitchen renovation project in progress, highlighting the installation of modular cabinetry and countertops. The focus is on the structural and functional aspects of the carpentry work, with attention to detail and precision in the assembly process.
